instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `with-saved-stream-position` that records a stream's file position before running body and seeks back to that position on exit, regardless of how the body exits. Use gensyms to avoid double-evaluating the stream form.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET* ((#:G1 S) (#:G2 (FILE-POSITION #:G1)))
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (READ-LINE S)) (FILE-POSITION #:G1 #:G2)))
ACTUAL:   (LET* ((#:G112 S) (#:G113 (FILE-POSITION #:G112)))
            (UNWIND-PROTECT (PROGN (READ-LINE S))
              (FILE-POSITION #:G112 #:G113)))

--- stderr ---
